{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = GSS Kholien
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[GSS Kholien]] is a ship commanded by [[Nelthan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[GSS Kholien]] is a ship that hosted a peacekeeping force.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Captain Vallenar, this is Commander Nelthan of GSS Kholien.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
